items.claim: Max Holloway prefers to start fights slowly to get a feel for his opponent.
items.quote: Max is a guy that likes to get a feel for the fight and get it going

items.claim: Max Holloway will target McGregor's lead leg and body to neutralize his left hand.
items.quote: Holloway is going to look to attack the leg of McGregor, throw the kicks to the body, threaten some high kicks as well to bang up that left arm of McGregor to take away some sting in that left hand.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will experience an adrenaline dump and energy mismanagement due to his long layoff.
items.quote: But with the adrenaline dump, being away for a while, he's going to mismanage himself. He's going to use a ton of energy.

items.claim: Max Holloway possesses the durability to survive early pressure from Conor McGregor.
items.quote: Max is not going to be put away.

items.claim: Max Holloway's high-volume striking style is a kryptonite matchup for Conor McGregor.
items.quote: What's a kryptonite matchup for McGregor? guy that's got durability, volume
